entity.label: Elon
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A Hittite, father of Bashemath, Esau’s wife (Gen. 26:34).

nodes.label: Elon
nodes.description: A Hittite, father of Bashemath, Esau’s wife (Gen. 26:34).

nodes.label: Adah
nodes.description: The first of Esau’s three wives, the daughter of Elon the Hittite (Gen. 36:2, 4), called also Bashemath (26:34).

verses.text: And Esau was forty years old when he took to wife Judith the daughter of Beeri the Hittite, and Bashemath the daughter of Elon the Hittite:
Esau took his wives of the daughters of Canaan; Adah the daughter of Elon the Hittite, and Aholibamah the daughter of Anah the daughter of Zibeon the Hivite;
